tasks.title: Wall Plaster
tasks.notes: The wall plaster of the sub-station next to Taher Hall pump room was damaged. The wall plastered has been thoroughly revamped completed.

tasks.title: Fence of open area
tasks.notes: The open area around the Taher hall pump has been fenced with welded mesh. Materials used: Road base, cement, MS galvanised 2 inch pipe, welded green mesh and padlock.The work is carried out by our AUS maintenance team. The approx material cost was AED 650.00

tasks.title: Shade cleaning
tasks.notes: Shade in primary section quadrangle area was had lots junks on the shade, it's has been cleaned by external contractor(Mr. Md. Amanulla)

tasks.title: Interlocking & astro turf
tasks.notes: The boys assembly area installation of astro turf in 2 area and aslo installation of interlocking in 2 area. Work has been thorough completed by the company named Hamtom(Mr. Sajeer).

tasks.title: Soft padding for the KG play area
tasks.notes: Soft padding work for 22 metal pillars in KG back side KG play area has been done by the company Hamton(Mr. Sajeer).

tasks.title: KG library furniture
tasks.notes: FS2 library complete set up new furniture supplied & installed by the company named Hampton(Mr. Sajeer).

tasks.title: Classroom furniture
tasks.notes: Supplied of Students table & chair set(185 sets)& 9 nos of teachers' desks with drawer in Sixth form center by Mr. Aiyaman & Shahzad.

tasks.title: Tiles repaired
tasks.notes: Nos of 10 tiles were popped up and broken in the main auditorium and revamped with new tiles by Mr Galeeb.

tasks.title: Deep excavation of the football ground
tasks.notes: Due to huge underground leakage there is no water in the fire hydrant- deep excavation done 1.5mtr depthx1.5mtr width of 80 meter from Taher hall pump room to Taher hall to 1st fire hydrant incl. some interlocking area by Mr. Galeeb. The civil work was done but no leakages found and postponed for summer break.

tasks.title: Astro turf-main football ground
tasks.notes: The football astro turf replacement work and quotation submitted by Mr. Mohammed Ameen.

tasks.title: EPDM SBR
tasks.notes: The existing epdm sbr flooring got ripped off and to be redone and to continue the whole plain concrete area where the volleyball coat is. The price is given as approximately by Mr Md. Ameen

tasks.title: Metal sheet ramp
tasks.notes: Removal of existing metal sheet ramp and recasting with a proper concrete ramp with two sided railing from the bus ground to primary concrete area(Approx cost).

tasks.title: Refurbished of 4 restrooms
tasks.notes: Primary section nos of 4 washrooms to be revamped with all new facilities including all the doors, sinks, commode, tiles,supply & installation of false ceiling and will all necessaries requirement(In short a complete washrooms) from the outside contractors. The price may be decrepancy ups & down>

tasks.title: Refurbished of 4 restroom
tasks.notes: No of 4 washrooms in girls section to be refurbished with all facilities incl. false ceiling.

tasks.title: AIRCON units
tasks.notes: The current ACs are really in not good condition i.e, making noise, not giving proper cooling and frequent being broken. required of 90 AC units but at least 40 AC units are ok to replace in respective classrooms.

tasks.title: Metal gate 1 & 2
tasks.notes: Gate no 1 & 2 both metal gates are in not good condition especially gate no 1. This is very difficult to open and close( got rusted, touching the flooring and its hinges get broken often times even after repairing of it. Plan to repalce with sliding one as gate no 3.

tasks.title: Slanted boundary wall
tasks.notes: The boundary wall back side of primary section is slanted due to the rain water and ground pushed - pressed towards the wall, needs to demolish the existing slanted wall and making new concrete block wall(approx price).

tasks.title: External building painting
tasks.notes: Thorough external painting of Admin-A level-KG-Girls-Boys & Primary building with JOTUN jotashield brand paints(Approx prcie).

tasks.title: Ceiling Fan
tasks.notes: Some ceiling fans in respective section to be replaced with new one the reason fans are rusty, noisy and broken due to very old.

tasks.title: Gate 6 boundary light
tasks.notes: There are 22 wall fence pillar at gate no 6 and 22 pillars light to be installed.

tasks.title: Garden Turf
tasks.notes: The open garden area in respective section landscaping to be covered by green astro turf(Area 665 SQM by Mr Amanullah.

tasks.title: Supply & installation of interlocks
tasks.notes: Girls section back side in open sand area and a bit near bus washing area(Size about 140SQM.

tasks.title: Complete revamping of KG building
tasks.notes: The complete building to be revamped including toilets leakage and leakage during rain from the roof top and concrete cracked too.

tasks.title: New laptops
tasks.notes: Required of 60 new lappy device for the AY 2026-2027.

tasks.title: FS2 Classroom Furniture
tasks.notes: Supply of rectangular wards table 75 nos and 327 wards chair for FS2 classrooms to replace the old broken classroom furniture. Vendor: Mr. Joseph.

tasks.title: Expansion of Pathway
tasks.notes: The reposition of existing ramp, tiling work and more from KG to boys side.

tasks.title: Water cooling system
tasks.notes: FS2 Washrooms water during summer is very hot and this is health & safety concern to the KG wards. Supplier name:Mr. Mumtaj

tasks.title: Taher Hall ICT lab flooring
tasks.notes: The exsting flooring removal and reinstallation with new ones with same design but ceramic tiles to the flooring in Taher Hall ICT lab. Contact person: Mr. Mark.

tasks.title: Underground pipe replacement
tasks.notes: The underground fire hydrant pipe to be replaced about 200mtr from Taher hall pump room to boys soccer ground interlocking area to front side of Taher Hall to Girls section interlocking area(Taher hall side) till all 4 fire hydrant from pump room to soccer ground(approx price.

tasks.title: Cast iron grating
tasks.notes: Bus washing area drainage cast iron cover 60 running meter. Contact person: Mr. Shiva

tasks.title: ICT flooring
tasks.notes: The hard flooring with styrofoam and ceramic tiles in ICT lab & corridor in Taher Hall. Contact person: Mr. Shiva

tasks.title: Corner Guard
tasks.notes: Reinstallation of new cushion red coloured corner guards of 18 nos fire hose metal boxes in Girls, primary, KG and boys section. Carried out by our internal maintenance team.
